summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx to apply charcoal background (bg-charcoal) with beige text (text-beige) throughout the footer, including the bottom bar, Admin Sign In link, visitor counters, and copyright text. This directly addresses REQ-56's requirement for contrast-compliant colors using design system tokens. The implementation uses the existing design system color tokens (charcoal #2C2C2C as background, warm beige #F5F0E8 as text) consistently across the footer component.
